name: Infinite Loop - Repeated Tool Calls
description: Agent calls the same tool repeatedly without making progress, indicating an infinite loop.

name: Circular Reasoning Loop
description: Agent enters a circular reasoning pattern, revisiting the same conclusions without new information.

name: Retry Storm
description: Agent retries the same failing operation excessively without backoff.

name: Self-Referential Loop
description: Agent references its own output as input, creating a feedback loop.

name: Oscillating Decisions
description: Agent alternates between two conflicting actions repeatedly.

name: Runaway Chain
description: Chain of thought grows unbounded without reaching a conclusion.

name: Stuck in Planning
description: Agent keeps generating plans but never executes any action.

name: Recursive Decomposition Loop
description: Agent recursively decomposes tasks into subtasks without ever completing any.

name: Confirmation Bias Loop
description: Agent keeps seeking confirmatory evidence in a loop, ignoring disconfirming data.

name: Empty Response Loop
description: Agent generates empty or near-empty responses in a loop.

name: Hallucinated Tool Call
description: Agent attempts to call a tool or function that does not exist.

name: Invalid API Endpoint
description: Agent constructs API calls to endpoints that do not exist.

name: Made-Up Reference
description: Agent cites non-existent sources, papers, or documentation.

name: Fabricated Data
description: Agent generates statistical data or metrics that have no basis in the provided context.

name: Phantom Parameter
description: Agent passes parameters to a tool that the tool does not accept.

name: Invented Schema
description: Agent references database tables or columns that do not exist.

name: Confident Wrong Answer
description: Agent provides a definitive answer that contradicts the provided context.

name: Ghost Dependency
description: Agent imports or references libraries and packages that do not exist.

name: False Capability Claim
description: Agent claims to perform an action it cannot actually perform (e.g., accessing the internet).

name: Misattributed Source
description: Agent attributes information to the wrong source document.

name: Request Timeout
description: LLM API call exceeds the configured timeout threshold.

name: Slow Response
description: Session duration exceeds acceptable response time threshold.

name: Deadline Exceeded
description: Agent operation exceeds the maximum allowed execution time.

name: Cascading Timeout
description: Timeout in one service causes cascading timeouts in dependent calls.

name: Stalled Session
description: Session remains in running state for an unusually long time.

name: Tool Execution Timeout
description: A tool call takes significantly longer than expected to complete.

name: Retrieval Timeout
description: RAG retrieval step times out, leaving the agent without context.

name: API Rate Limit Error
description: LLM provider returns a rate limit (429) error.

name: Authentication Error
description: API key is invalid, expired, or missing.

name: JSON Parse Failure
description: Agent output is not valid JSON when structured output was expected.

name: Type Mismatch Error
description: Agent returns data of an unexpected type, causing downstream failures.

name: Context Window Exceeded
description: Input exceeds the model's maximum context window.

name: Model Not Found
description: The requested model is not available or has been deprecated.

name: Provider Unavailable
description: LLM provider is temporarily unavailable (5xx error).

name: Invalid Tool Arguments
description: Agent passes invalid arguments to a tool call.

name: Missing Required Field
description: Agent output is missing a required field in the expected schema.

name: Permission Denied
description: Agent attempts to access a resource it does not have permission for.

name: Content Filter Triggered
description: LLM provider content filter blocked the response.

name: Empty LLM Response
description: LLM returns an empty or null response.

name: Connection Reset
description: Network connection to the LLM provider was unexpectedly reset.

name: Excessive Token Usage
description: Session consumes significantly more tokens than expected.

name: Cost Overrun
description: Session cost exceeds the expected budget threshold.

name: Repeated Expensive Calls
description: Agent makes multiple calls to expensive models when cheaper alternatives exist.

name: Unnecessary Large Context
description: Agent sends unnecessarily large context to the model, inflating costs.

name: Cost Spike
description: Session cost is more than 10x the average cost for this agent.

name: Redundant API Calls
description: Agent makes duplicate API calls with identical parameters.

name: Premium Model Overuse
description: Agent uses premium models for simple tasks that could use cheaper models.

name: Unbounded Generation
description: LLM generates an unusually long response consuming excessive output tokens.

name: Session Failure with High Cost
description: Session fails after consuming significant resources.

name: Generic Failure
description: Session ends in a failed state for any reason.
